name: Plymouth Industrial REIT Inc. 7.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Plymouth Industrial REIT Inc. is a real estate investment trust focused on the acquisition and operation of single and multi-tenant industrial properties. The 7.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock represents a preferred equity interest in the REIT. The REIT is headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts.
